author: Rosetta Zidian Guo
description: Share just a note to a secure link w/ or w/o password. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Fuyonder
manifest.description: Publish one note to a secure DocFerry share link.
manifest.name: DocFerry

name: DocFerry

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.21

This release publishes the refreshed public README and the latest DocFerry sharing UI copy on top of the `0.0.20` public free-plugin baseline.

**README refresh:**

- Adds real product screenshots for publishing, password and expiry options, reader output, share management, settings management, and import.
- Adds a live reader preview: `https://docferry.fuyonder.tech/s/Gt5Wy3pwzY`.
- Clarifies that explicitly referenced images and attachments can be shared together with the note in one publish action.
- Keeps account, quota, hosted-service, legal-page, privacy, install, and release review disclosures visible in the public README.

**UI copy:**

- Renames the unpublished-note right-click action to `Share thru Docferry`.
- Uses the same title in the new-share dialog so the entry point and publish modal match.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: veil-chow-fyaic
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.20

This patch release freezes the current public free plugin package after the July 2 release-line cleanup.

**Release-line cleanup:**

- Reissues the current public free plugin package as `0.0.20` so product, QA, and seed-user testing do not depend on the overloaded `0.0.19` history.
- Includes the product-manager README logo update that uses the PNG DocFerry mark in the public repository docs.
- Records that the old DocFerry hosted service now provides public Privacy Policy and Terms of Service pages.

**Current public free behavior:**

- Public billing controls remain disabled in the plugin UI.
- Connected accounts use the hosted free quota and can request more free quota through the beta-list flow.
- The plugin keeps the upload disclosure before publishing vault content.
- The plugin package remains the Obsidian release artifact set: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.19

This patch release refreshes the settings experience and public documentation.

**Settings UI and copy:**

- Renames account sign-in actions to `Log in / Sign up`.
- Replaces Plus-oriented copy with the free quota and `Request more quota` beta-list flow.
- Adds clean cloud-logo helper notes without square logo bases.
- Moves the Shares privacy note below the share management panel.
- Formats Import details as bullet points.

**Documentation:**

- Adds centered DocFerry cloud logos to the root README and plugin README.
- Updates README copy for the current free quota, settings labels, and release metadata.
- Removes stale version, alpha, Config, and missing internal-install references from plugin docs.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.18

This patch release addresses an Obsidian review CSS compatibility warning.

**Review hardening:**

- Replaces `display: contents` in logo wrapper CSS with a transparent inline-flex wrapper.
- Keeps the DocFerry logo as a raw transparent asset without a square badge or card base.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.17

This release addresses Obsidian Community review feedback and refreshes the local plugin UI.

**Review hardening:**

- Adds the MIT license and aligns package metadata with it.
- Removes `Obsidian` from the plugin description.
- Removes unsupported zip asset copy from current release documentation.
- Declares the bundled cloud upload SDK at the repository root so automated review can resolve its types.
- Avoids Promise-returning click callbacks in UI event handlers.
- Avoids internal calls to the deprecated settings `display()` method.
- Removes CSS `!important` overrides.
- Documents clipboard behavior and upload SDK local/session storage behavior in `PRIVACY.md`.

**UI refresh:**

- Centers the main import view with a larger transparent DocFerry logo.
- Removes the account shortcut from the main view.
- Renames the main shortcut from Config to Settings.
- Keeps share/account sub-pages centered to avoid layout jumps.
- Cleans the settings import panel spacing.
- Refreshes the share completion modal.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: veil-chow-fyaic
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.16

This release is the Obsidian-review hardening pass for the June 30 public free launch plugin.

**Review hardening:**

- Removes non-plugin server, CLI, importer, and legacy release-note files from the public plugin repository.
- Keeps the public repository focused on the Obsidian plugin source, manifest, privacy notice, build metadata, and release assets.
- Replaces raw heading elements with CSS-classed elements.
- Replaces inline hidden-render styles with a CSS class.
- Restores root ESLint/type-resolution metadata for Obsidian automated review.

**Public billing:**

- Checkout and public paid plans remain disabled in this release.
- Approved access upgrades are handled through request review.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`
- `docferry-obsidian-plugin-0.0.16.zip`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

DocFerry 0.0.15

This release supersedes `0.0.14` and publishes the June 30 public free launch plugin.

**Included:**

- Current DocFerry dashboard/settings UI.
- Fuyonder account connection.
- Upload disclosure before publishing vault content.
- Request-access flow for reviewed Plus access while public billing remains disabled.
- Share, import, stop-sharing, and linked-status workflows.
- Free-launch access policy integration with the hosted DocFerry service.

**Public billing:**

- Checkout and public paid plans remain disabled in this release.
- Approved access upgrades are handled through request review.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`
- `docferry-obsidian-plugin-0.0.15.zip`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.13

This release addresses the remaining automated review suggestion. There are no user-facing behavior changes.

**Build dependency cleanup:**

- Replaces the `builtin-modules` npm package with Node's built-in `module.builtinModules` in `esbuild.config.mjs`.
- Removes `builtin-modules` from both the plugin and repository-root `package.json` / lockfiles.
- This resolves the review recommendation that `builtin-modules` be replaced with a native alternative.

**No behavior changes:**

- The bundled plugin behavior is unchanged; commands, settings, and publish/import/share flows are identical.

**Compatibility:**

- Minimum Obsidian version remains `1.13.0`.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.12

This release makes the repository's type setup resolvable from the repo root so the Obsidian automated review can resolve the `obsidian` type declarations. There are no user-facing behavior changes.

**Automated review / type resolution:**

- Adds repository-root `package.json`, `package-lock.json`, `tsconfig.json`, and `eslint.config.mjs`.
- These let the review environment install and resolve `obsidian` types from the repo root even though the plugin source lives under `plugin/`.
- This clears the `@typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-*` warnings, which appeared only because the audit could not resolve Obsidian's types — the plugin source already lints clean locally (`tsc -noEmit` and ESLint both pass with zero problems).
- `obsidian` (1.13.0) and its `@codemirror/state` (6.5.0) / `@codemirror/view` (6.38.6) peers are pinned to exact versions so a clean `npm install` resolves without peer-dependency conflicts.

**No behavior changes:**

- The built `main.js` is unchanged in content; commands, settings, and publish/import/share flows are identical.

**Compatibility:**

- Minimum Obsidian version remains `1.13.0`.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.11

This release responds to the automated review round on 0.0.10 and hardens the project's type-safety configuration. There are no user-facing behavior changes.

**Type safety:**

- Enables full TypeScript `strict` mode (plus `skipLibCheck`, `esModuleInterop`, and `forceConsistentCasingInFileNames`).
- `tsc -noEmit` and ESLint (`typescript-eslint` recommended type-checked + `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd`) both pass with zero problems.
- The `no-unsafe-*` warnings seen in the 0.0.10 review are resolved-as-`any` false positives that occur when the review's type-aware lint cannot resolve the Obsidian type declarations; the source itself is type-safe.

**Privacy:**

- Clipboard access remains write-only and is triggered only by explicit user actions, as documented in `PRIVACY.md`.

**Compatibility:**

- Minimum Obsidian version remains `1.13.0`.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

This release restores the stable DocFerry Cloud endpoint after the Bondie subdomain cutover was found to be unhealthy during smoke testing.

**Cloud endpoint:**

- Removes the unhealthy `https://docferry.bondie.io` default from the bundled plugin.

**Compatibility:**

- Minimum Obsidian version remains `1.13.0`.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.9

This release fixes the automated review error reported for 0.0.8:

**Compatibility:**

- Minimum Obsidian version remains `1.13.0`.

**Code-quality fixes:**

- Removes the two `eslint-disable-next-line obsidianmd/ui/sentence-case` comments, which the Obsidian Community scanner does not allow.
- Rewords the custom server URL placeholder from `http://127.0.0.1:8787` to `Server URL: http://127.0.0.1:8787`.
- Rewords the manual cloud token placeholder from `dfc_...` to `Cloud token: dfc_...`.
- Adds a local ESLint configuration using `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` so sentence-case and other review checks are caught before the next submission.

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`
releases.name: DocFerry 0.0.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.8

This release addresses the remaining Obsidian Community automated review feedback.

**Compatibility:**

- Minimum Obsidian version is now `1.13.0` (was `1.4.0`). This matches the `Plugin.settings` API and the deprecated `SettingTab` APIs used by the settings UI.

**Code-quality fixes:**

- Replaces `window.confirm` with an Obsidian `Modal`-based confirmation dialog.
- Uses `activeDocument` instead of `document` for hidden preview rendering and theme CSS capture, improving popout-window compatibility.
- Tightens TypeScript catch-variable typing with `useUnknownInCatchVariables` and removes unused `_error` bindings.
- Adds `as unknown` casts around `JSON.parse` to satisfy strict ESLint rules.
- Removes redundant type assertions (`as string`, `as HTMLElement`).
- Avoids passing the plugin instance as a `Component` to `MarkdownRenderer.render`; rendering now uses a dedicated, short-lived `Component`.
- Binds translator callbacks before passing them into `ConfirmModal`, avoiding unbound-method warnings.
- Removes unnecessary `async` from event handlers and keeps `Setting` callbacks in block bodies.

**Behavior notes:**

- Vault access is limited to the active note and the files directly referenced by it; the plugin does not enumerate the whole vault.
- Clipboard access is write-only and triggered only by explicit user actions (publishing or copying a share link).

**Release assets:**

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
DocFerry 0.0.7

This review-fix release addresses Obsidian Community automated review feedback for the first public package:

- Adds GitHub release notes.
- Adds GitHub artifact attestations for the bundled release assets.
- Removes direct style assignment from the hidden preview renderer.
- Uses Obsidian `Setting(...).setHeading()` for settings headings.
- Avoids vault-wide enumeration in share management by using the account share list and direct source-path lookup.
- Tightens TypeScript error handling around caught errors and API error envelopes.

Release assets:

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`
